title: curriculum + eval corpus at scale
manager: The manual, curriculum, and eval program at full size — the book with its v11-unlocked spine, learn-by-repairing as both on-ramp and eval set, the taxonomy's 1,336 seeds filling in, every snippet CI-proven. This is FSL's teaching surface and its own benchmark at once: a corpus of (broken, tape, fixed) tuples that teaches humans and evaluates models, with every example proven correct so the teaching material can never quietly rot into wrongness.
cs: `test --doc` over markdown fences + doc-comment examples; curriculum = (broken, tape, fixed) tuples with splits + contamination policy; eval suite (NL->FSL, FSL->NL, fix-given-counterexample) versioned; every instance = NL<->FSL corpus pair, canonically formatted.
